items.content_html: Typewriter Mode is a plugin that adds typewriter scrolling (current line stays at a fixed position on the screen), a highlight for the current line, dimming of unfocused paragraphs and more to Obsidian.
items.title: davisriedel/obsidian-typewriter-mode: Typewriter Mode is a plugin that adds typewriter scrolling (current line stays at a fixed position on the screen), a highlight for the current line, dimming of unfocused paragraphs and more to Obsidian.

items.content_html: Obsidian plugin that prevents the creation of files with double extensions such as `.jpg.md`.
items.title: uoFishbox/obsidian-double-extension-blocker: Obsidian plugin that prevents the creation of files with double extensions such as `.jpg.md`.

items.content_html: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.
items.title: obsidianmd/obsidian-releases: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.

items.content_html: Moon Phases for Obsidian provides real-time lunar phase data, seamlessly integrating daily moon phases into notes and offering an interactive monthly calendar for easy tracking of celestial cycles.
items.title: Thaifood13/moon-phases-plugin: Moon Phases for Obsidian provides real-time lunar phase data, seamlessly integrating daily moon phases into notes and offering an interactive monthly calendar for easy tracking of celestial cycles.

items.title: cs-schmidt/vault-scripts: A utility plugin for managing my Obsidian-based knowledge management system.

items.content_html: An Obsidian plugin to only show the first mention of a note under "Unlinked mentions."
items.title: KellyNyanbinary/first-link-only: An Obsidian plugin to only show the first mention of a note under "Unlinked mentions."

items.content_html: Weaver is a useful Obsidian plugin that integrates ChatGPT/GPT-3 into your note-taking workflow. This plugin makes it easy to access AI-generated suggestions and insights within Obsidian, helping you improve your writing and brainstorming process.
items.title: vasilecampeanu/obsidian-weaver: Weaver is a useful Obsidian plugin that integrates ChatGPT/GPT-3 into your note-taking workflow. This plugin makes it easy to access AI-generated suggestions and insights within Obsidian, helping you improve your writing and brainstorming process.

items.content_html: AI-powered Obsidian plugin that automatically generates tags and classifies metadata for your notes, enhancing organization and streamlining your knowledge management workflow.
items.title: GoBeromsu/Metadata-Auto-Classifier: AI-powered Obsidian plugin that automatically generates tags and classifies metadata for your notes, enhancing organization and streamlining your knowledge management workflow.

items.content_html: Obsidian Plugin for social-scientific Qualitative Data Analysis (QDA). An open alternative to MAXQDA and atlas.ti, using Markdown to store data and research codes.
